message:
test(graph): add comprehensive unit tests for graph module

Add 61 unit tests covering:
- skills_to_issues conversion (empty, single, multiple skills)
- Priority mapping from quality scores (all threshold boundaries)
- Status mapping (active=Open, deprecated=Closed)
- Label generation (layer prefix, tag normalization, deduplication)
- Dependency resolution (direct ID, capability-based, case-insensitive)
- Edge cases (self-ref, unresolved deps, multiple providers)
- Metadata parsing (empty, null fields, invalid JSON)
- BvClient construction and builder methods
- write_beads_jsonl (creation, serialization, unicode, special chars)

Previously the graph module had only 5 tests. Now has 61 tests
providing thorough coverage of skill-to-issue conversion and bv integration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
